name: Pesto Meat Loaf
recipeIngredient: 8 slices Bacon, cooked crisp and crumbled (optional)
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 375°F. In a large bowl, thoroughly mix all ingredients together. Form meat mixture into a cylindrical shape; place in a shallow roasting pan. Bake for 1 1/4 hours. Serves 10 - 12. For pesto: Combine the following in a food processor - 1/2 cup fresh basil, 1/4 cup grated Parmesan cheese, 2 tablespoons olive oil and 1 clove garlic.
Note: This meat loaf may also be baked encased in a pastry. Use directions from any Beef Wellington recipe.
